I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: Button variant type change
Line 60: `<Button variant={ButtonVariant.primary} onClick={onDeploy}>`

The type change adds `'stateful'` to the union but doesn't remove any values. The current usage is `ButtonVariant.primary` which is still valid in the new type. **No code change needed** — `primary` is still a valid variant value.

### Fix 2: EmptyState family migration
The file currently uses the old v5 pattern with `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` as separate components. In PF v6, `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` were removed — their functionality was absorbed into `EmptyState` directly via props:

- `titleText` moves from `EmptyStateHeader` to `EmptyState`
- `headingLevel` moves from `EmptyStateHeader` to `EmptyState`  
- `icon` moves from `EmptyStateHeader` (which took `<EmptyStateIcon icon={...} />`) to `EmptyState` as just the icon component reference

Looking at the current code (lines 43-48):
```jsx
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.sm}>
  <EmptyStateHeader
    titleText={t('Deploy Data Foundation on IBM FlashSystem')}
    headingLevel="h4"
    icon={<EmptyStateIcon icon={GreenCheckCircleIcon} />}
  />
```

In v6, this becomes:
```jsx
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.sm}
  titleText={t('Deploy Data Foundation on IBM FlashSystem')}
  headingLevel="h4"
  icon={GreenCheckCircleIcon}
>
```

The `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` components should be removed from imports since they'll no longer be used.

Let me apply the changes:

### Fix 3
Line: 60
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext]:
Component <EmptyState> has a new prop `titleText` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <EmptyState> and determine if any should be moved to the `titleText` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <EmptyState>{content} other children</EmptyState>
  After:  <EmptyState titleText=>other children</EmptyState>

Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>
